input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule VE.2.5.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ve.2.5.1
            TITLE: the mounts for video/photographic cameras must be of a safe and secure design.

            CONTENT:
            rule VE.2.5.1: The mounts for video/photographic cameras must be of a safe and secure design.
VE.2.5.1 The mounts for video/photographic cameras must be of a safe and secure design.

final_answer: The mounts for video/photographic cameras must be of a safe and secure design.
